item.title: Redhead Monday
item.description: I'm a redhead, not this redhead obviously. This reminds me of my 20's. Only swap the espresso martinis for kamikaze shots.

item.title: Poppy Porca
item.description: Sorry for the delay in comic updates! But here’s a little gift- a Poppy Orca! So happy to have rescued our senior girl. Also, "Porca" apparently means sIut (and a few other things like pig I think) in Italian. Our vet laughed and told us this. Still accurate, we stand by her nickname. Vet even agreed. Poppy is a little huss and loves everyone she gets her paws on. Want to see more comics, check out my webtoons: https://www.webtoons.com/en/challenge/ristay/list?title_no=170400&page=1
item.dc:creator: ristay

item.title: I don’t know why men fight so hard against male pattern baldness, just rock the cue ball.

item.title: Zelensky Oil portrait
item.description: I promised myself not to paint any politicians ever. Broken promise. It was boiling inside me since this war started. Humans will never learn. More of my work: https://www.instagram.com/garyantes_art/
item.dc:creator: idontknowmoreusernames

item.title: 21-year-old Ukrainian mathematician who represented Ukraine at the European Girls' Mathematical Olympiad and won a silver medal, was killed on March 8th, 2022 during a Russian attack on Kharkiv.
item.dc:creator: SavingHongKong

item.title: Day 290: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Mac Rib Double Smash Beef Patty, American Cheese, Smoked Brisket Sautéed In House BBQ Sauce, Slow-Smoked Beef Rib, Southern-style Comeback Sauce And Tangy Barbecue Sauce On 3 Pieces Of Texas Toast From Craft By Smoke and Fire/Smoke & Fire Social Eatery In Anaheim, La Habra, Paramount, Pomona, CA Thank You @jnco For This Burger Submission! 12/10 Previous Day 289: https://imgur.com/gallery/3Y1gwIA MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! Map of all burger spots that are available on yelp! Big thanks to @OhBoyDoIHaveNews4U for this. Link to his post and map https://imgur.com/gallery/vcObDuD
item.dc:creator: crypto

item.dc:creator: SeeEmilyPlay81

item.title: I've curated some easy-to-read Ukraine updates for people that want to be informed but don't have time.
item.description:
Putin arrests the head of the FSB's foreign intelligence branch. Subsequently, many other high-ranking members of the FSB have been arrested. Reasons include embezzlement of funds, and sycophantically preaching that Ukraine was weak or would welcome the Russian orc "liberators" prior to starting their invasion, and in some cases for speaking out against the Russian invasion (or at least saying before the invasion that it wouldn't go well). https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-10603045/Putin-places-head-FSBs-foreign-intelligence-branch-house-arrest.html https://www.pravda.com.ua/eng/news/2022/03/11/7330474/
This one is actually pretty significant because it's quite possible it could happen, and *actually* be accidental. Russia recently started attacks on western Ukraine; over the weekend, at least one missile strike landed less than 15 miles from the Polish border. https://www.wsj.com/livecoverage/russia-ukraine-latest-news-2022-03-11/card/u-s-warns-full-force-of-nato-would-respond-if-russia-hits-poland-zEmQR8bzJCRx5QiKilww https://fortune.com/2022/03/13/nato-will-act-russia-hits-alliance-us/
Word is that China is mostly declining. They won't even sell them aircraft parts. https://www.ft.com/content/30850470-8c8c-4b53-aa39-01497064a7b7 https://www.cnn.com/2022/03/13/politics/jake-sullivan-meeting-chinese-counterpart-ukraine/index.html https://www.nytimes.com/2022/03/13/us/politics/russia-china-ukraine.html
They are installing puppet governors in their stead. https://finance.yahoo.com/news/russian-spy-chiefs-under-house-163301889.html https://www.washingtonexaminer.com/news/putin-purges-russian-intelligence-as-military-elite-suffer-devastating-losses https://www.nytimes.com/2022/03/12/world/europe/ukraine-mayor-kidnapped-ivan-fyodorov.html https://www.rferl.org/a/ukraine-mayor-abducted-russia-dniprorudne/31750806.html https://americanmilitarynews.com/2022/03/putin-arrests-russias-own-spy-chiefs-report-says/
Belarus isn't buying it.https://www.pravda.com.ua/news/2022/03/11/7330425/
Russia has started setting off charges at the Zaorizha nuclear power plant (largest in Europe, provides a huge amount of energy for the continent). We've been hearing for over a week how they may use false flag tactics to blame Ukraine for developing dirty bombs and/or chemical weapons, potentially to justify "small-scale" nuclear attacks against Ukraine (admittedly though, the second half is speculation). This one is just breaking in the last couple of hours, so not much detail yet. Don't know the extent of damages. https://www.ukrinform.net/rubric-ato/3429430-russians-blow-up-part-of-munition-stocks-at-zaporizhia-npp-energoatom.htmlhttps://www.pravda.com.ua/eng/news/2022/03/14/7331247/ https://www.anews.com.tr/world/2022/03/14/ukraine-reports-explosion-near-zaporizhzhia-nuclear-power-plant
item.dc:creator: VikingWeightlifting

item.title: Random shit.....off my phone 5
item.description: Edit* Credit Texts from a dog
item.dc:creator: Madmiller37

item.title: Update! Eating and drinking on her own.
item.description: Lucy was taken to the emergency vet last weekend and diagnosed with Old Dog Vestibular Syndrome. It’s basically puppy vertigo. After a few scary days and helpful tips from the vet and Imgurians- she’s eating and drinking on her own!!
item.dc:creator: kittycrazy88

item.title: Last year I drew this picture using one line that never intersects
